task_completion.description: Heat Exchanger (HX-200) is present and labeled
task_completion.visual_evidence: A heat exchanger shape is visible on the diagram canvas and is explicitly labeled with the tag 'HX-200'.

task_completion.description: Temperature Transmitter (TT-201) is present on the outlet and labeled
task_completion.visual_evidence: An instrument shape (typically a circle/bubble) labeled 'TT-201' is placed near or connected to the outlet side of the heat exchanger.

task_completion.description: Temperature Indicator Controller (TIC-201) is present and labeled
task_completion.visual_evidence: An instrument shape labeled 'TIC-201' is visible on the diagram canvas.

task_completion.description: Control Valve (TV-201) is present on the steam inlet and labeled
task_completion.visual_evidence: A valve shape labeled 'TV-201' is placed on the steam inlet line leading to the heat exchanger.

task_completion.description: Components are connected by process and signal lines to form a feedback loop
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 3 connecting lines (edges) link the components together, representing the process flow and control signals (e.g., TT-201 to TIC-201, TIC-201 to TV-201, and process piping to/from the heat exchanger).

task_completion.description: The source .drawio file is saved to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'heat_exchanger_pid.drawio' is visible on the Desktop, in a file manager window, or listed in a terminal directory output.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a PNG file to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'heat_exchanger_pid.png' is visible on the Desktop, in a file manager window, or listed in a terminal directory output.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool (like draw.io) to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a visual diagramming interface (drag-and-drop, connecting shapes), rather than writing raw XML/drawio code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the diagram from individual components
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progressive placement and connection of individual shapes, rather than the agent simply downloading a pre-made image from the internet or copying an existing file.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to generate the PNG
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu or a similar legitimate export dialog, rather than just renaming a file extension in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: A valid P&ID for this task must contain at least 4 components: a Heat Exchanger (HX-200), a Temperature Transmitter (TT-201) on the outlet, a Temperature Indicating Controller (TIC-201), and a Control Valve (TV-201) on the steam inlet. It requires a minimum of 3 connecting edges to form a feedback loop (e.g., transmitter to controller, controller to valve, and process piping). The expected output files are 'heat_exchanger_pid.drawio' and 'heat_exchanger_pid.png'.
